data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"4b8f-924d","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T17:51:29.355331+00:00","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Severity-only review schema: remove scores and boolean from review output","description":"Remove the scores object and REVIEW_RESULT/MIN_SCORE from the reviewer output schema entirely. Make findings[].severity the single source of truth for pass/fail determination.","successCriteria":["reviewer-findings.json schema requires exactly two top-level keys: findings and summary","Reviewer agent output contract no longer includes REVIEW_RESULT or MIN_SCORE lines","record-review.sh derives STATUS exclusively from findings[].severity","review-status file no longer contains a score= line","Gate never blocks based on text content of finding descriptions","All existing severity levels retain their current blocking/non-blocking semantics"]},"stories":[{"id":"6c75-cc5d","title":"As a commit workflow, severity-only pass/fail STATUS is derived without scores","description":"Update review infrastructure to accept 2-key schema and derive STATUS from severity","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["validate-review-output.sh accepts 2-key schema, rejects files with scores key","record-review.sh derives STATUS=failed for critical/important/fragile, STATUS=passed for minor/empty","record-review.sh no longer performs score-based cross-validation or computes min_score","review-status file contains no score= line","Minor finding with critical in description text does not cause STATUS=failed","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Safety-critical \u2014 test all severity levels and edge cases","[Reliability] Handle both old and new schemas during transition","[Consumer Impact] review-stop-check.sh and session-misc-functions.sh need severity language"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1, SC3, SC4, SC5"},{"id":"f19a-c97e","title":"As a code reviewer agent, I emit findings and summary without scores or REVIEW_RESULT","description":"Update all reviewer agent definitions and shared templates to new schema","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["No agent file contains REVIEW_RESULT, MIN_SCORE, or scores in output contract","reviewer-base.md specifies 2-key schema and 3-line output format","Pre-output checklist added for all 5 categories","Deep-tier specialist delta files include negative scope constraints","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] reviewer-base.md propagates to all agents; delta files need individual attention","[Reliability] All 4 overlay agents must be included"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["6c75-cc5d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1, SC2"},{"id":"0f3b-f2fb","title":"As a review orchestrator, I route and resolve findings without referencing scores","description":"Update workflow orchestration and sprint orchestrator references","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md does not reference REVIEW_RESULT, MIN_SCORE, or score thresholds","resolve-overlay-findings.sh derives blocking status from severity without constructing scores","review-fix-dispatch.md extracts findings array only","sprint SKILL.md uses severity-based language","Unit tests written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Verify fragile is preserved as blocking","[Reliability] review-fix-dispatch.md must be precise"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["6c75-cc5d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2, SC3, SC6"},{"id":"62ca-77ef","title":"Update project docs to reflect severity-only review schema","description":"Update CLAUDE.md and other docs referencing old schema","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md accurately describes severity-only schema","review-status file format documented correctly"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md","[Scope Boundary] plan-review uses separate scores system \u2014 do NOT modify"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["6c75-cc5d","f19a-c97e","0f3b-f2fb"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All SCs (docs)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["6c75-cc5d","f19a-c97e","0f3b-f2fb","62ca-77ef"]}}
